titleStmt.title: SII 9.320: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 320. (A.R. No. 217 of 1918.) ON A BEAM IN THE MALLIKARJUNASVAMI TEMPLE AT KURUVATTI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1117, Ānanda, Chaitra, śu. 1, Śukravāra, corresponding to A.D. 1194 March 25, Friday, in the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballāḷa (II). It records that while the king was in the nelevīḍu of Bāguḷi, he made a gift of (the whole tract of land) called Mukkurabbe in Beṇṇeyūr twelve to Lōkābharaṇa-Munīndra for repairs, offerings and etc. to the temple of Āhavamallēśvara. Chaṇḍarasa of Beṇṇeyūr twelve is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaran
yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi se(ṁ)myaktacūḍāmaṇi malerājarāja maleparoḷgaṁḍa
kadanapracaṁḍa niḥsaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoysaḷa vīraballāḷadēvaru bāguḷiya nelavīḍaliddu
śrīmadāhavamallēśvaradēvara dēvālyada khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrnōddhārāṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgārtthaṁ .
be(ṁ)ṇnevūrppaṁneraḍaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ . mukurabbeyaṁ sarvvanamaśyadattiyāgi .
śakavarṣa 1117 neya Ānaṁdasaṁvacharada caitra śuddha pāḍiva śukravāradaṁdu dhārāpūrvakaṁ biṭṭaṁ .
ballāḷabhūpanāhavamallēśaṁgittu mukkurabbeya deseyiṁdellā phalabhōgamumaṁ sallōkābharaṇamu
nikarakarppisidaṁ . ciravenisi be(ṁ)ṇneyūrppaṁneraḍaṟa caṁḍarasa mukhyavā bhūmigadhīśvararolaviniṁda .
lōkābharaṇamunīṁdraṁge tējasāmyamanittaru . Aṁtu nīrmmanneyamuṁ sarvanamaśyamumāgi
biṭṭarī dharmmapratipāḷakaṁganaṁtapuṇya vidanaḷidavaṁganaṁtanāyakanarakadalu bīḷugu
svadattaṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.320 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
